metadata.title: Ysrael Mauricio — Software Development & AI Solutions
metadata.description: Full-stack software development, AI solutions, and technical consulting. Web, mobile, and desktop applications.

Common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this? This action cannot be undone.

Home.title: Portfolio SaaS
Home.subtitle: Professional software development services
Home.heroSubtitle: Custom software solutions tailored to your needs. From web applications to mobile apps, we deliver quality that drives results.
Home.featureQualityDesc: Every project is built with best practices and rigorous testing.
Home.featureTimelyDesc: We respect your timeline with transparent scheduling.

Auth.name: Full name
Auth.twoFactorInfo: Enter the code from your authenticator app.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.welcomeBack: Welcome back! Here is an overview of your account.
Dashboard.trackProgress: Track your project progress and milestones
Dashboard.reviewQuotes: Review and compare your saved quotes
Dashboard.name: Name
Dashboard.deleteAccountWarning: Once you delete your account, your data will be anonymized after the retention period. This action cannot be undone.
Dashboard.deleteConfirm1: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone immediately but has a retention period before full anonymization.
Dashboard.deleteConfirm2: This will permanently close your account. All your data will be anonymized after the retention period. Continue?
Dashboard.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

Admin.title: Admin Panel
Admin.welcome: Welcome to the admin panel. Manage your projects, contracts, payments, and settings.
Admin.manageProjectsDesc: View all projects, update statuses, manage milestones
Admin.contractsDesc: Create contracts, approve and send for signing
Admin.biDashboardDesc: Business metrics, recalibration data, and insights
Admin.deletedUsersDesc: View users within the retention window
Admin.noSettings: No settings found. Add settings via the database or API.
Admin.cvDescription: Upload, replace, or download your CV. Only one active CV file is stored at a time.
Admin.uploadCVDesc: Upload a PDF file. The existing CV will be replaced.
Admin.clickToSelect: Click to select a PDF file
Admin.profileLinksDesc: Manage the profile links displayed on your public profile.
Admin.noLinks: No profile links found. Add links directly in the database.
Admin.deletedUsersDesc: Users that have been soft-deleted and are still within the retention window. These users will be automatically anonymized after the retention period expires.
Admin.noDeletedUsers: No users in the retention window.

QuoteWizard.title: Get a Quote
QuoteWizard.subtitle: Configure your project, choose options, and get an instant price and timeline estimate.
QuoteWizard.boliviaOnlyDesc: This category is available only for clients in Bolivia.
QuoteWizard.selectFirst: Please select a category and product type to see pricing.

Blog.title: Blog
Blog.subtitle: Insights, tutorials, and updates from our team.
Blog.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment!
Blog.loginToComment: Please sign in to leave a comment.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio
Portfolio.subtitle: A selection of projects we've built.
Portfolio.thisPlatformBadge: This very platform is built with our own SaaS!

Testimonials.title: Testimonials
Testimonials.subtitle: What our clients say about working with us.
Testimonials.thankYou: Thank you! Your testimonial has been submitted for review.

Payment.title: Payments
Payment.subtitle: Manage payments and confirm bank transfers.

BIDashboard.title: Business Intelligence Dashboard
BIDashboard.subtitle: Key metrics, project distribution, and recalibration data for quarterly feedback.
BIDashboard.recalibrationDesc: Comparison of quoted delivery dates vs. actual delivery for delivered projects where scope did not change. High deviations indicate categories that may need recalibration.
BIDashboard.noRecalibration: No recalibration data available yet. Data appears once delivered projects have signed contracts with quote snapshots.

chat.title: Chat with Índigo
chat.subtitle: AI assistant — ask me anything about our services

messages.welcome: Hello! I'm Índigo, your AI assistant. Ask me about our services, pricing, or how we can help with your project!
messages.error: I'm sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again or click "Talk to Ysrael" for immediate assistance.

escalation.title: Talk to Ysrael
escalation.description: I'll do my best to help, but if you prefer to talk directly with Ysrael, choose your preferred channel:
escalation.admin_notified: Ysrael has been notified via email as well.

Chatbot.close_stale: This conversation has been closed due to inactivity. Start a new chat if you need help.

Services.title: Services
Services.subtitle: Custom software solutions tailored to your needs, from web to desktop.
Services.webDesc: Modern web applications, APIs, and platforms using the latest technologies. Includes WordPress solutions.
Services.mobileDesc: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android.
Services.desktopDesc: Cross-platform desktop applications with modern interfaces.
Services.maintenanceDesc: Ongoing maintenance, updates, and technical support for your existing software.

About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: Software developer passionate about building great digital experiences.
About.bio: I'm a software developer with experience in web, mobile, and desktop development. I specialize in creating custom solutions that help businesses grow and thrive in the digital landscape.

Maintenance.title: Maintenance Plans
Maintenance.subtitle: Keep your software running smoothly with our maintenance and support plans.
